text: Really smooth checkout experience! managed to place my order in like 30 seconds
Finally!! the old checkout was so clunky. this is way better
Works fine for me. didn't notice much difference tbh
Love the new express option. saved my card details first try
Seems faster, will see how it holds up over time
Checkout loaded slowly but eventually worked
Super easy now! My weekly order took half the time
Good update overall. would like to see Apple Pay support added
the new checkout is great but payment took forever to confirm
Alright I guess. Not sure what changed
This is a huge improvement over what you had before, keep it up
Hit an error on payment confirmation but refreshed and it went through
payment page hangs on the spinning wheel. Had to try 3 times
Slower than the old version honestly. what happened
Interface is clean at least
app crashed during checkout. my order isn't showing in history but i think it went through?
Works sometimes, doesn't other times. pretty frustrating
getting a timeout error when I try to pay. this wasn't happening before
Payment failed twice then succeeded on third attempt. charged once thankfully
the checkout is really slow idk what happened to the speed
still works for me. maybe just during peak hours it's slow?
PLEASE FIX THE CHECKOUT. i can't place an order without it hanging
App crashes every time I tap confirm payment. iOS 17 if that matters
its broken. the old one was better even if it looked ugly
I had to switch to desktop to complete my purchase because the app kept freezing
Doesn't work at all. uninstalled. will come back when you fix it
Still working for me on Android but I hear others having issues?
support team was helpful at least even if the issue isn't fixed yet
my whole team uses this for corporate orders. now nobody can check out. this is costing us time
3 payment failures in a row. Going to competitor until this is sorted
Raised a ticket 2 days ago, no resolution. checkout still broken
Will keep using for now but this needs to be fixed asap
checkout page just shows a white screen now
Same issue as everyone else. payment keeps timing out
not sure if my order went through or not, too confusing. need clearer error messages at minimum
Gave up trying to use the express checkout. back to old method for now
Is anyone from the team even monitoring this? feels like radio silence from your side
Checkout still broken. 3rd day. Just fix it.
Worked fine on Day 1 but definitely not anymore. something broke in an update
I really want to like this feature but right now it just doesn't work
